title: Gamma Cagadota
description: Adds rope, wireless torches, modifiable tnt, mob defecation, and more
body:
Classic mod I originally made a long time ago that adds a bunch of contrived stuff.
### Features
 - Rope, which drops whatever block it is holding when broken
 - Mobs produce manure which can be harvested with a shovel, crafted into blocks, fermented,  placed in a centrifuge, baked into bricks, which can then be fired out of the poo cannon, a new enchantable weapon
- Wireless redstone torches that can be linked together with a calibrator
- Sulphur ore, which can be used to craft new type of (admittedly overpowered) tnt
    - There's also a rare variant of sulphur which has some interesting properties

### Tips
 - Don't spam sneak
 - Keep an eye on the recipe book
 - The fermentation process requires blocks to be in a dark environment, above a block that is adjacent to water
 - There is a faster fermentation process that involves dangling blocks from a soggy rope in a dim place
 - The maymay block is cool, but be careful - if the server is weak then you can cause server crashes with it
- One can modify the new tnt blocks via crafting. Try adding *black powder*, *string*, *pickaxes*, *feathers*, *arrows*, and *coal*
   - It's also possible to combine these blocks together - even different types.

![cool preview image](https://i.imgur.com/CO0AFjr.png)
